mentors.name: Sarah Chen
mentors.description: I am an experienced AI Architect with a 15-year background in Natural Language Processing and machine learning. I have successfully scaled systems from PoC to enterprise level and helped a startup reach acquisition by a major tech firm. I excel at system architecture design and data strategy.

mentors.name: Kenji Tanaka
mentors.description: A former financial regulator specializing in compliance strategy for disruptive technology. I provide guidance for companies developing blockchain solutions, payment processors, and global financial software that require strict regulatory alignment and scaling plans.

mentors.name: Fatima Al-Fassi
mentors.description: User-experience designer focused on inclusive and accessible mobile solutions for diverse global audiences. I excel at simplifying complex workflows and building intuitive user interfaces, especially for applications targeting users on lower-bandwidth networks.

mentors.name: David Osei
mentors.description: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) with deep expertise in building secure infrastructures for cloud-native applications. I help startups design zero-trust architectures and prepare for rigorous security audits like SOC 2 and ISO 27001.

mentors.name: Elena Rostova
mentors.description: Former VP of Product at a leading SaaS company. I specialize in helping early-stage founders refine their product vision, establish agile development cycles, and define effective Go-To-Market (GTM) strategies for B2B enterprise software.

mentors.name: Marcus Vance
mentors.description: Hardware engineer and supply chain expert. I guide startups through the transition from hardware prototyping to mass manufacturing, specializing in IoT device architecture, embedded firmware, and sourcing reliable suppliers.

mentors.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
mentors.description: Physician turned software entrepreneur. I assist startups operating in the heavily regulated healthcare space, offering strategic advice on HIPAA compliance, electronic health record (EHR) integrations, and bioinformatics platforms.

mentors.name: Wei Zheng
mentors.description: Supply chain technologist who built fulfillment networks for top e-commerce brands. I mentor companies creating logistics software, warehouse management systems, and D2C retail platforms looking to optimize operations.

mentors.name: Chloe Dubois
mentors.description: Pioneer in mixed reality environments and spatial computing. I advise teams building immersive experiences for education, enterprise training, and gaming using Unity and Unreal Engine.

mentors.name: Jamal Tariq
mentors.description: Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) veteran. I help fast-growing startups stabilize their infrastructure, set up robust CI/CD pipelines, and transition to Kubernetes to handle massive traffic spikes gracefully.

partners.name: Alex K.
partners.description: Full-stack developer looking for a fast-paced environment. Strong experience in React, Node.js, and scaling PostgreSQL databases. Looking to contribute code in exchange for equity in an early-stage venture.

partners.name: Mei Ling
partners.description: NUS Master's student specialized in data pipeline construction, Python (Pandas/NumPy), and GCP Dataflow. Seeking to help an AI/ML focused startup manage their ingestion pipelines.

partners.name: Sofia Ramirez
partners.description: Cross-platform mobile developer with 4 years of experience building consumer-facing apps using Flutter and Dart. I am looking to join a founding team to lead front-end mobile development.

partners.name: Liam O'Connor
partners.description: Blockchain developer passionate about decentralized finance (DeFi). Experienced in writing secure Solidity smart contracts and integrating Web3 interfaces. Seeking a startup innovating in the crypto space.

partners.name: Ananya Patel
partners.description: Robotics enthusiast and computer vision engineer. I specialize in real-time object detection and image segmentation. Looking for a hardware or autonomous vehicle startup to partner with.

partners.name: James Wilson
partners.description: Cloud architect who loves automating infrastructure. Proficient in AWS, serverless architectures, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform). I want to help a bootstrapped startup build a scalable backend from day one.

partners.name: Yuki Nakamura
partners.description: Design-obsessed frontend engineer. I turn complex Figma files into pixel-perfect, highly responsive web applications using Vue.js and Tailwind. Looking to partner with a strong backend engineer.

partners.name: Anders Berg
partners.description: High-performance backend developer focusing on Go and Rust. I love building highly concurrent microservices and optimizing latency. Looking for a highly technical product that needs serious backend horsepower.

partners.name: Fatima Noor
partners.description: QA Automation Engineer with a keen eye for edge cases. I build comprehensive end-to-end testing suites to ensure zero-defect deployments. I want to join an early-stage team to instill quality engineering practices early on.

partners.name: Diego Silva
partners.description: Game engine programmer with a focus on Unreal Engine and C++. Experienced in writing custom shaders and optimizing multiplayer networking logic. Interested in joining an indie game studio or immersive tech startup.

startup_queries_for_testing.startup_description: We are building a scalable mobile application (EcoTrack) that uses NLP to analyze user purchase history from bank APIs and automatically calculate the carbon footprint of their purchases. We need guidance on high-throughput vector similarity matching of product databases and advice on scaling the ML model.

VirtuFlow is creating a cross-border, blockchain-based remittance application to reduce fees for migrant workers. We are targeting a global launch but are facing massive regulatory hurdles in Southeast Asia. We need a partner who understands financial compliance and scaling disruptive decentralized finance solutions globally.
